en_description:
Perform a 5-hit melee combo in front of you, dealing 10/10/10/15/30 damage.
☆
Perform a 5-hit melee combo in front of you
Hit 1: Thrust (10).
Hit 2: Slash (10). 
Hit 3: Kick (10). 
Hit 4: Slash (15). 
Hit 5: Cross Cut (15x2).
cn_description:
对前方进行五段近战攻击，
造成10/10/10/15/30点伤害。
☆
对前方进行五段近战攻击，
1 - 戳刺，造成10点伤害。
2 - 劈砍，造成10点伤害。
3 - 踢，造成10点伤害。
4 - 劈砍，造成15点伤害。
5 - 十字斩，造成15x2点伤害。

en_description: Throw 3 knives, each dealing 20 damage. Costs 3 Energy.
cn_description: 发射3把飞刀，每把造成20点伤害，消耗3点能量。

en_description: Dash forward. Attacking during the dash deals 15 damage.
cn_description: 向前突进，如果在冲刺时攻击，造成15点伤害。

en_description: Gain 20% increased Melee Damage and 30% Attack Speed for 7 seconds. Cooldown: 16s.
cn_description: 通过怒吼激励自己，提升20%的近战攻击力和30%的攻击速度，持续7秒。冷却时间16秒。

en_description: On cast, deal 100 damage to nearby enemies and Stun them for 2s.
cn_description: 技能施放时对周围的敌人造成100点伤害，并附加2秒眩晕。

en_description: Gain 30% Melee Critical Chance during the effect.
cn_description: 在持续时间内，提高30%近战攻击的暴击率。

en_description: Cooldown reduced by 5s.
cn_description: 冷却时间减少5秒。

en_description: Energy regeneration increased by 200% during the effect.
cn_description: 在持续时间内，提高200%的能量回复速度。

en_description: Each enemy kill extends the duration by 0.8s.
cn_description: 每击杀一个敌人，将持续时间延长0.8秒。

en_description: Attack Speed bonus becomes 180%, then decays to 30% over 4 seconds.
cn_description: 使用后，提升的攻击速度变为180%，并在4秒内逐渐衰减至30%。

en_description: Dash in a chosen direction, becoming untargetable during the dash. Summon shadows that perform 6 piercing strikes along the path, each dealing 40 damage. Cooldown: 9s.
cn_description: 选择一个方向冲刺，冲刺期间无法被敌人选取，并召唤影子对路径上的敌人进行6段戳刺攻击，每段造成40点伤害。冷却时间9秒。

en_description: Summoned shadow count increased by 3.
cn_description: 技能召唤的影子数量增加3。

en_description: Gain 5 Shield for 6 seconds after casting.
cn_description: 技能施放后获得5点护盾，护盾持续6秒。

en_description: Piercing strikes Cripple enemies on hit.
cn_description: 戳刺命中时附加残废。

en_description: Shadow attack range increased by 100%, damage increased by 25.
cn_description: 每个影子的攻击范围提高100%，伤害增加25点。

en_description: Final strike deals 800% damage and Stuns for 2.5s.
cn_description: 技能最后现身时的戳刺伤害提升至800%，并附加2.5秒眩晕。

en_description: No longer dash. Only summon shadows. Cooldown reduced by 2s. Stores 2 charges.
cn_description: 不再进行位移，只召唤影子进行戳刺。冷却时间减少2秒，可以存储2次充能。

en_description: After a brief charge, unleash 3 blade waves in a forward cone. Charging increases waves up to 7 after 1.5s. Each wave deals 40 damage. Cooldown: 10s.
cn_description: 短暂蓄力后，向前方扇形区域斩出3道刀波，刀波数量会随蓄力时间增加，最多蓄力1.5秒并发出7道刀波。每道刀波造成40点伤害。冷却时间10秒。

en_description: Charge speed increased by 100%.
cn_description: 蓄力速度提高100%。

en_description: Wave distance increases by 40% with charge time. Damage to distant enemies increased up to 100%.
cn_description: 刀波距离会随蓄力时间增加40%，并且对更远处的敌人造成的伤害会提高，最多提高100%。

en_description: Instant cast refunds 50% Cooldown.
cn_description: 瞬间施放时，返还50%的冷却时间。

en_description: Each hit on the same target increases damage by 10.
cn_description: 对同一个目标每命中一个刀波，伤害增加10点。

en_description: Casting at full charge releases 6 additional waves.
cn_description: 刚好蓄满时，刀波数量增加6。

en_description: Gain 16 Shield at the start of charging, decaying over 3s.
cn_description: 蓄力开始时获得16点护盾，在3秒内逐渐衰减。

en_description: Fire a steel chain that deals 40 damage and Stuns for 1s. Hitting an enemy or terrain pulls you forward, performing a spinning slash that deals 50 damage. Cooldown: 6s.
cn_description:
发射一道铁索，命中敌人时造成40点伤害并附加1秒眩晕。
钩中敌人或墙体后，会迅速拉向目标，并在飞行过程中施放回旋斩，对周围敌人造成50点伤害。
冷却时间6秒。

en_description: Hitting terrain refunds 70% Cooldown.
cn_description: 钩中墙壁时返还70%的冷却时间。

en_description: Direct hits deal +60 damage.
cn_description: 铁索直接命中敌人时，伤害增加60点。

en_description: Direct hits apply 4 stacks of Wound.
cn_description: 铁索直接命中敌人时，附加4层伤口。

en_description: Spinning slash damage +25, radius +60%.
cn_description: 回旋斩的伤害增加25点，伤害范围扩大60%。

en_description: Cooldown reduced by 2s. Stores 2 charges.
cn_description: 冷却时间减少2秒，可以存储2次充能。

en_description: No longer dash. Pull enemies to your position and Stun for 2s.
cn_description: 不再向目标冲刺，而是命中敌人时将敌人拉至施放位置并附加2秒眩晕。

en_description: Consume 3 Energy to throw 3 poisoned daggers forward.They can pierce through up to 1 enemy, dealing 30 damage and applying 2 stacks of Poison to each target. Cooldown: 8s.
cn_description: 消耗3点能量，向前方投掷3把淬毒飞刀，飞刀可以穿透最多1个敌人，对每个目标造成30点伤害并附加2层中毒。冷却时间8秒。

en_description: Direct damage increased by 35.
cn_description: 直接伤害增加35点。

en_description: Each knife applies +1 Poison.
cn_description: 每把淬毒飞刀附加的中毒层数增加1层。

en_description: If Energy is above 50%, throw 3 additional knives.
cn_description: 如果使用时能量超过一半，淬毒飞刀数量增加3。

en_description: Knife pierce count increased by 2.
cn_description: 淬毒飞刀的穿透数量增加2。

en_description: Throwing knives directly casts Poison Blade Rain. Energy Cost +2.
cn_description: 投掷飞刀时，直接施放毒刃暴雨。能量消耗+2。

en_description: Enter Stealth for 3s after casting.
cn_description: 施放技能后进入潜行，持续3秒。

en_description: Consume 2 Energy to throw knives around you, dealing 50 damage. After casting, 3 knives drop on the ground nearby. Cooldown: 4s.
cn_description: 消耗2点能量，向周围投掷飞刀，对周围敌人造成50点伤害。施放技能后，3把飞刀将掉落在附近地面上。冷却时间4秒。

en_description: Dropped knife count increased by 4.
cn_description: 掉落在附近的飞刀数增加4。

en_description: Stores 3 charges.
cn_description: 技能可以存储3次充能。

en_description: Hitting at least 4 enemies reduces Cooldown by 3s.
cn_description: 命中了至少4个敌人时，冷却时间减少3秒。

en_description: Damage increases against closer enemies, up to 180%.
cn_description: 对越近的敌人造成的伤害会提高，最高提高180%。

en_description: Base damage +30. Repeated hits deal +9 damage, stacking up to 7 times.
cn_description: 基础伤害增加30点，同一个敌人每次受到刀扇伤害时，再受到9点伤害，最多叠加7层。

en_description: Dash briefly before releasing Fan of Blades. Cooldown reduced by 1.5s.
cn_description: 施放技能时，先进行一次快速位移，再释放刀扇。冷却时间减少1.5秒。

en_description: Throw a smoke bomb at your feet for 3s. Every 0.6s, a shadow clone attacks once. While not attacking inside smoke, enter Stealth. Cooldown: 15s.
cn_description: 在脚下投掷一个烟雾弹，烟雾持续3秒。每0.6秒召唤影分身在烟雾中攻击一次。在烟雾中未攻击时，进入隐身。冷却时间15秒。

en_description: Enemies inside smoke are Slowed by 65%.
cn_description: 烟雾中的敌人移动速度减少65%。

en_description: Apply 3 Poison per second to enemies inside smoke.
cn_description: 每秒对烟雾中的敌人附加3层中毒。

en_description: Cooldown reduced by 4s.
cn_description: 冷却时间减少4秒。

en_description: Energy regeneration increased by 300% inside smoke.
cn_description: 在烟雾中，能量恢复速度提升300%。

en_description: Shadow clone attack speed increased by 150%.
cn_description: 影分身的攻击频率提高150%。

en_description: Duration +2.5s. No longer summon shadow attacks.
cn_description: 持续时间增加2.5秒，不再召唤影分身攻击。

en_description: Dash to target location, then stab toward the nearest enemy 4 times. Each stab deals 30 AoE damage. Cooldown: 8s.
cn_description: 快速冲向目标位置，然后朝最近的敌人方向戳刺4次。每次戳刺造成30点范围伤害。冷却时间8秒。

en_description: Stores 3 charges.
cn_description: 技能可以存储3次充能。

en_description: Hits apply 2s Stun.
cn_description: 命中敌人时，附加2秒眩晕。

en_description: Stab range increased by 75%.
cn_description: 戳刺距离提高75%。

en_description: Backstab damage increased by 200%.
cn_description: 戳刺造成的背刺伤害提高200%。

en_description: Stab count increased by 3.
cn_description: 戳刺次数增加3。

en_description: (Passive) Dashing has a 30% chance to summon a shadow to stab the nearest enemy.
cn_description: （被动）冲刺时，有30%的几率召唤影子向最近的敌人进行一次戳刺。

en_description: Summons a lightning bolt, dealing 55 damage to enemies in an area and linking them together for 2.5 seconds. Cooldown: 11s.
cn_description: 召唤一道闪电，对范围内的敌人造成55点伤害，并将这些敌人链接在一起，持续2.5秒。冷却时间11秒。

en_description: Cooldown reduced by 3.5s.
cn_description: 冷却时间减少3.5秒。

en_description: Area increased by 40%.
cn_description: 技能范围提高40%。

en_description: Damage increased by 40.
cn_description: 闪电伤害增加40点。

en_description: Applies Armor Break for 2.5s.
cn_description: 技能同时附加破甲，持续2.5秒。

en_description: When lightning hits, reduce other skill cooldowns by 4s.
cn_description: 闪电击中你时，使其他技能的冷却时间减少4秒。

en_description: Increases the duration of links by 3.5 seconds.
cn_description: 链接的持续时间增加3.5秒。

en_description: Dash forward and slash. Can be recast within 3.5s, up to 3 times, dealing 25/40/55 damage. Cooldown: 12s.
cn_description: 向前冲刺斩击，在3.5秒内可再次施放，总共可施放3段。对攻击到的敌人造成25/40/55点伤害。冷却时间12秒。

en_description: Critical Chance increased by 25%.
cn_description: 此技能的暴击率提高25%。

en_description: Cooldown reduced by 4s.
cn_description: 冷却时间降低4秒。

en_description: Dealing damage grants 5 Shield for 1.5s.
cn_description: 技能造成伤害时，获得5点护盾，持续1.5秒。

en_description: Third slash Stuns for 3s.
cn_description: 第三段技能附加持续3秒的眩晕。

en_description: When HP is below 12%, the third hit restores 8 HP on hit.
cn_description: 生命值小于12%时，第三段技能命中时可以回复8点生命值。

en_description: Third dash range increased, damage increased by 150%.
cn_description: 第三段技能的冲刺距离提高，伤害提高150%。

en_description: Continuously throw knives toward target direction, firing 12 knives per second, each dealing 32 damage. Costs 4 Energy per second. Ends when Energy is depleted. Move at 25% speed while channeling. Cooldown: 14s.
cn_description:
向目标方向连续投掷飞刀，每秒发射12枚飞刀，每枚造成32点伤害。
每秒消耗4点能量。能量耗尽时，停止施放。施放其他技能时，停止施放。施放需要至少4点能量。
投掷期间，移动速度降低至25%。冷却时间14秒。

en_description: Killing enemies restores 2 Energy.
cn_description: 击杀敌人时，回复2点能量。

en_description: Fires 15 knives per second.
cn_description: 每秒发射数量提高到15发。

en_description: Move at 75% speed while channeling.
cn_description: 施放期间，移动速度提高到75%。

en_description: Cannot move while channeling. Critical Chance increased by 35%.
cn_description: 施放期间，不再能移动或冲刺。此技能的暴击率提高35%。

en_description: When stopped due to Energy depletion, fire 12 knives in a forward cone.
cn_description: 因能量耗尽而停止施放时，向前方扇形区域发射12发飞刀。

en_description: Cooldown reduced to 4s.
cn_description: 冷却时间降低到4秒。

en_description: Cleave enemies ahead for 135 base damage. Killing an enemy reduces Cooldown to 3s. Cooldown: 14s.
cn_description: 重劈前方敌人，造成135点基础伤害。造成击杀时，冷却时间降低到3秒。冷却时间14秒。

en_description: Each stack of Wound increases damage by 20.
cn_description: 敌人身上的每层伤口使伤害提高20点。

en_description: Instantly kill enemies below 12% HP.
cn_description: 此技能会直接杀死生命值小于12%的敌人。

en_description: Each kill permanently increases base damage by 0.5.
cn_description: 此技能击杀敌人时，永久增加0.5点基础伤害。

en_description: Damage radius is increased by 35% and inflicts 2 seconds of Fear on all enemies hit.
cn_description: 伤害范围扩大35%。并对命中的所有敌人附加2秒恐惧。

en_description: On kill, gain 75% Attack Speed and 15% Move Speed for 3s.
cn_description: 此技能击杀敌人时，攻击速度提高75%，移动速度提高15%，持续3秒。

en_description: Cooldown reduced to 5s.
cn_description: 冷却时间降低到5秒。

en_description: Leap to target location, dealing 110 damage in an X-shaped area and Stunning for 1.5s. Cooldown: 9s.
cn_description: 跳跃到目标位置，对X型范围内的敌人造成110点伤害，并附加1.5秒眩晕。冷却时间9秒。

en_description: Enemies at the center take damage twice.
cn_description: 对十字中心的敌人造成两次伤害。

en_description: Base damage +30. Area of effect increased by 30%.
cn_description: 基础伤害+30，作用范围扩大30%。

en_description: Critical Chance increased by 35%.
cn_description: 技能暴击率提高35%。

en_description: Hit enemies are Linked for 5s.
cn_description: 命中的敌人被链接在一起，持续5秒。

en_description: Leave a shadow that repeats the skill after 2.5s, dealing 50% damage and Stunning for 1s.
cn_description: 施放技能时留下一个影子，在2.5秒后重复施放一次技能，造成50%伤害并附加1秒眩晕

en_description: Enemy deaths nearby reduce Cooldown by 1s.
cn_description: 周围敌人死亡时，技能冷却时间减少1秒。

en_description: Flying kick forward, dealing 90 damage to the first enemy and 50% damage to nearby enemies. Jump backward after hit and restore 4 Energy. Cooldown: 6.5s.
cn_description: 朝目标方向飞踢，对命中的首个目标造成90点伤害，对周围的敌人造成50%伤害。命中后迅速向后跳跃，并回复4点能量。冷却时间6.5秒。

en_description: AoE damage increased to 100%.
cn_description: 对周围敌人的伤害提高到100%。

en_description: Stores 3 charges.
cn_description: 技能可以存储3次充能。

en_description: Close-range hits apply Armor Break for 5s.
cn_description: 近距离施放并命中敌人时，将敌人额外击退并附加破甲，持续5秒。

en_description: Damage increased by 40.
cn_description: 伤害增加40点。

en_description: Energy restored increased by 2.
cn_description: 技能回复的能量提高2点。

en_description: Critical hits reset Cooldown.
cn_description: 暴击时，重置此技能的冷却时间。

en_description: Summon 3 blades that orbit you, dealing 14 damage on contact. Lasts 4s. Cooldown: 15s.
cn_description: 召唤3个飞刃环绕自身旋转，触碰敌人时造成14点伤害。持续4秒。冷却时间15秒。

en_description: Blade count +1.
cn_description: 飞刃数量增加1。

en_description: When the blade returns to you, Energy is fully restored.
cn_description: 飞刃回到自身时，回满能量。

en_description: Cooldown reduced by 5s.
cn_description: 冷却时间减少5秒。

en_description: Damage taken reduced by 20% while active.
cn_description: 被飞刃环绕时，承受伤害减少20%。

en_description: Blades no longer follow movement. Duration +3s.
cn_description: 飞刃不再跟随移动。技能持续时间+3秒。

en_description: Each kill increases spin speed by 20%.
cn_description: 持续期间，每击杀一个敌人时，旋转速度提高20%。

en_description: Throws a mass of dark mist to a target location, forming a shadow.The shadow has 28 base Attack, automatically pursues nearby enemies, and lasts 6 seconds. This skill stores 2 charges. Cooldown: 8s.
cn_description: 向目标位置投掷一团黑雾，形成一个影子。影子拥有28点基础攻击力，自动追击附近的敌人，持续6秒。技能可以存储2次充能。冷却时间8秒。

en_description: Summoning deals 70 damage and applies Cripple for 2.5s.
cn_description: 召唤影子时，黑雾造成70点伤害，并附加残废，持续2.5秒。

en_description: The shadow's Attack Speed is increased by 35%.
cn_description: 影子的攻击速度提高35%。

en_description: Shadows throw knives instead. Cooldown: 4s.
cn_description: 影子向敌人投掷飞刀。冷却时间4秒。

en_description: Cooldown reduced by 1 second. This skill can store up to 3 charges.
cn_description: 冷却时间减少1秒，技能可以存储3次。

en_description: Duration +7s. Summoning costs +2 Energy.
cn_description: 影子持续时间增加7秒，召唤时额外消耗2点能量。

en_description: (Passive) Every 12 Energy spent summons a shadow to assist.
cn_description: （被动）每消耗12点能量时，召唤一个影分身在身边协助作战。

en_description: Coat your weapon with poison, causing melee attacks to apply 1 Poison for 4.25s. Cooldown: 18s.
cn_description: 为武器涂毒，使接下来4.25秒内所有近战攻击附加2层中毒。冷却时间18秒。

en_description: Cooldown reduced by 5s.
cn_description: 冷却时间减少5秒。

en_description: First melee hit applies 8 extra Poison.
cn_description: 涂毒后的首次近战攻击额外附加8层中毒。

en_description: Melee attacks apply +1 Poison
cn_description: 近战攻击附加的中毒层数增加1层。

en_description: Throwing knives apply 1 Poison while active.
cn_description: 涂毒状态下，飞刀造成伤害时附加1层中毒。

en_description: Taking damage releases poison mist, applying Cripple and 6 Poison.
cn_description: 涂毒状态下，受到攻击时，释放一片毒雾，对周围的敌人附加残废，并附加6层中毒。

en_description: Each Poison stack increases melee damage by 12%.
cn_description: 涂毒状态下，敌人身上的每层中毒使对其造成的近战伤害提高12%。

en_description: Unleash a blade wave that continuously travels forward for 7 seconds. It ricochets upon hitting a wall. The wave deals 45 damage on contact and applies 1 stack of Wound. Cooldown: 12 seconds.
cn_description: 发出一道不断向前推进的刀波，持续7秒。撞到墙时，反弹。刀波触碰敌人时造成45点伤害，并附加1层伤口。冷却时间12秒。

en_description: Applies +1 additional Wound stack.
cn_description: 附加伤口增加1层。

en_description: Damage increased by 24.
cn_description: 伤害提高24点。

en_description: Stores 3 charges.
cn_description: 技能可以存储3次。

en_description: Projectile speed +40%. First hit deals +45 damage.
cn_description: 弹道速度提高40%，首次命中一个目标时造成额外45点伤害。

en_description: After bouncing, duration +5s.
cn_description: 撞墙反弹后持续时间延长5秒。

en_description: (Passive) Casting has an 11% chance to fire an extra Blood Wave lasting 3.5s.
cn_description: （被动）发射刀波时有11%几率额外发射一道持续3.5秒的血斩波。

en_description: Unleash a moving blade cyclone dealing 80 damage per second for 3s. Cooldown: 14s.
cn_description: 向前挥砍出一个刀波组成的旋风不断向前移动。每秒造成80点伤害，持续3秒。冷却时间14秒

en_description: Cyclone pulls enemies toward its center.
cn_description: 旋风不断将敌人卷向中心。

en_description: Duration +1.5s.

Throw a sticky oil bomb that creates a patch of flammable oil at the target location. 
The oil lasts up to 6s. Cooldown: 8.5s.
